title: The Better Vanilla
description: [1.21.X] Improved visuals and performance, made for ANY and EVERY server or singleplayer.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa3e09bc666551cd6eaf36a0a9dae7616cef91f.png)
# ABOUT
Optimization and Beauty. All In One!
The Better Vanilla is focused on improved visuals and performance, made for ANY and EVERY server or singleplayer.
![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# FEATURES
* Many Optimization Mods
* Fixed Bugs in Vanilla
* Improved Visuals and Animations
* Shaders
* Client Tweaks and Improvements
* GUI and HUD Elements
* Waypoints and Coordinates Display
* Discord Rich Presence

# MY MODPACKS
* [Rising Legends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rl-craft) [1.20.1] RLCraft Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions.
* [Arcane Dragons [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcanedragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Arcane Dragons [NEOFORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcane-dragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Dragon Realm [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [Dragon Realm [FORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm-forge) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [FEAR](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fear) [1.20.1] The Ultimate Horror Modpack.
* [The Better Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-vanilla-fabric) [1.21.X] Vanilla with improved visuals and performance.

# VIDEOS
Send me your videos on Discord and you will be featured here.

# CREDITS
Resourcepack: [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) with [No Bushy Leaves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/staytrue-nobushyleaves) addon by HaiMcFly and the [Mandala's GUI - Dark mode](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) by cesar_zorak on top.
